zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Battisford於1366年出生在英國素可瓦特林時，她的父親Sir William Batisford of Wartling35歲，母親Lady Margaret de Peplesham31歲。她於大約1380年與John Codyng結婚。她去世於1453年8月6日在英國肯特坎特布瑞享年87歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Battisford于1366年出生在英国素可瓦特林时，她的父亲Sir William Batisford of Wartling35岁，母亲Lady Margaret de Peplesham31岁。她于大约1380年与John Codyng结婚。她去世于1453年8月6日在英国肯特坎特布瑞享年87岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞坎特布瑞 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Battisford was born in 1366, in Wartling, Sussex, England, her father, Sir William Batisford of Wartling, was 35 and her mother, Lady Margaret de Peplesham, was 31. She married John Codyng about 1380. She died on 6 August 1453, in Canterbury, Kent, England, at the age of 87, and was buried in Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Battisford est née en 1366, à Wartling, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Batisford of Wartling, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret de Peplesham, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Codyng environ 1380. Elle est décédée le 6 août 1453, à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Battisford 1366 in Wartling, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Batisford of Wartling 35 und ihre Mutter Lady Margaret de Peplesham 31. Sie hat um 1380 John Codyng geheiratet. Sie starb am 6. August 1453 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Canterbury, Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Battisford è nata il nel 1366 nel Wartling, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir William Batisford of Wartling, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Lady Margaret de Peplesham, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John Codyng circa 1380. Morì il 6 agosto 1453, nel Canterbury, Kent, England, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Battisford(이)가 1366년 영국 수세스 워틀링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Batisford of Wartling(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margaret de Peplesham(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1380년 John Codyng(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1453년 8월 6일 영국 켄트 캉르버이에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이 캉르버이 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Battisford nasceu em 1366, em Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Batisford of Wartling, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret de Peplesham, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John Codyng aproximadamente 1380. Ela faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1453, em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Battisford родилась в 1366 г. в местности вартлинг, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Batisford of Wartling было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret de Peplesham, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Codyng около 1380 г. Она умерла 6 августа 1453 г. в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури кэтедраль, кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Battisford nació en 1366, en Wartling, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Batisford of Wartling, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret de Peplesham, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John Codyng aproximadamente 1380. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1453, en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury Cathedral, Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
